per_outcome.operationalization: Count of distinct facts (out of 30 total) mentioned at least once in the group's chat discussion
Ratio of covered facts to total non-facilitator messages sent during discussion
Gini coefficient measuring evenness of fact distribution across the three candidate cities in discussion
Minimum count of previously unmentioned facts contributed by any single group member
Maximum count of previously unmentioned facts contributed by any single group member
Proportion of groups where every member contributed at least one new fact to the discussion
Proportion of groups selecting Eldoron (the objectively optimal city) as their majority decision
Average count of messages sent by group members, excluding facilitator messages; measures engagement/activity level
Average count of messages sent by the AI facilitator; measures intervention intensity rather than task output
Average word count per facilitator message; measures intervention characteristics rather than task output
Proportion of facilitator messages addressing a specific group member; measures intervention style rather than task output
